message:
fix(analysis): correct density formulas, harden search against blank queries

- Fix undirected graph density in causal impact networks to use
  2E/(N*(N-1)) with clarifying comments, and add density assertions to
  existing and new tests (causal.rs)
- Fix directed-graph density in drift baseline to drop the spurious 2x
  multiplier (drift.rs)
- Replace string-round-trip f64→i64 truncation with a direct cast,
  suppressing the clippy lint (forecast.rs)
- Early-return on whitespace-only search queries in execute_search and
  in the --robot-search CLI entry point, with matching unit and
  integration tests (search.rs, main.rs, cli_model_validation.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
